title: Assemblymember Rick Chavez Zbur introduced AB 309, a bill maintaining pharmacists’ discretion to provide sterile syringes to adults without a prescription.

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "Increased access to sterile syringes reduces transmission rates and prevents needless deaths.",
    "Research has shown that providing sterile injection supplies to people who inject drugs prevents transmission of HIV/AIDS and other infectious diseases.",
    "Providing sterile supplies helps build connections to care, including substance use disorder treatment.",
    "Pharmacists play a vital role in public health, particularly through harm reduction, disease prevention, and patient education.",
    "Allowing pharmacists to sell syringes without a prescription and provide counseling on drug treatment access improves health outcomes.",
    "Pharmacists are often the most accessible healthcare providers in underserved communities."
  ]
}
```
